predicates.name: is_surviving_legal_cohabitant_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legal cohabitant of the second (predeceased) person.

predicates.name: is_descendant_of
predicates.description: The first person is a descendant of the second person.

predicates.name: exception_applies_surviving_cohabitant_is_descendant
predicates.description: The exception applies: the provisions of paragraphs 1 to 3 do not apply because the surviving legal cohabitant is a descendant of the predeceased legal cohabitant.

predicates.name: paragraphs_1_to_3_apply
predicates.description: The provisions of paragraphs 1 to 3 apply to the surviving legal cohabitant in relation to the predeceased legal cohabitant.
